message:
fix(freeze): dup locals in relooper flushVstack to prevent use-after-free

The relooper's flushVstack was copying locals[N] to the physical stack
without duping ref-counted values. The full codegen's materializeVStack
correctly dups storage references (locals[], stack[]) when flushing, but
the relooper's equivalent did a raw assignment. This caused the physical
stack and locals to share a single refcount — when either path freed the
value, the other became a dangling pointer.
